name: C-7 --force overwrites an existing emit path per the operator-allowed surface
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v1.0.0 --emit a.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v1.1.0 --emit a.json --force && grep -q '"version"' a.json && echo overwritten 1>&2
